note: Proposed home-screen modules and tab structure for the PWA. Owner may override in blueprint review. Modules are ordered by priority within each phase. MVP = Phase 1 launch scope. Phase 2+ modules are flagged.

tabs.description: Morning intelligence landing page. Today's live events, top movers, trending, rules-snippet-of-the-day.
Currently in-progress matches across PPA and MLP. Real-time-ish scoreboard, bracket state, court assignments.
Upcoming + past events across both circuits. Filter by circuit (PPA/MLP), tier, country, date.
Team-centric view for MLP. Standings, rosters, schedules, per-team news.
Player search + per-player pages. Universal search, favorites ★, comparison ⇄ (Phase 2).
PPA Tour rankings (52-week + Race). Separate component from Ratings — do NOT merge.
DUPR public leaderboards. Separate component from Rankings — do NOT merge. Explicit visual + label distinction per KB-0009.
Recent video (YouTube Data API from official channels allowlist). Thumbnail + click-out default; iframe only if embed verified.
Rules reference (curated rule snippets; link to USAP rulebook PDF). 2026 rule changes. History/founding. Governance explainer.
Curated feed from T1/T2 newsletters + official handles. Phase 2 because ingestion complexity.

homeScreenModules.description: One-paragraph synthesis: today's most significant tournament day, any breaking news, what to watch.
Currently in-progress matches with team names, score, court. Collapses when no live events.
PPA and MLP events active today, with day-of-event context (R32 / QF / Finals).
Top 10 MLP teams by current standings points. Click-through to full standings.
Players with notable recent activity (event win, upset, deep run).
Biggest 7-day jumps/drops on PPA 52-week. Separate from Ratings Movers.
DUPR Risers (Reliability ≥80). Separate from Rankings Movers.
homeScreenModules.note: Phase 2 because DUPR scraping needs login credentials OR partner API.

homeScreenModules.description: Gold-medal matches from the last 48h across PPA + MLP.
Curated headlines from T1/T2 sources with 'developing' vs 'confirmed' labels.
48-hour YouTube highlights from PPA + MLP official channels.
Rotating one-rule explainer (especially 2026 rule changes early in season).
Date-matched history milestone. Sparse for a young sport — collapses on days without a match.

fields: filters by category (founding, governance, professional, growth)

favoriteTeam.defaultDisplay: Top pinned module on Daily Report tab

favoritePlayer.defaultDisplay: ★ favorite list in Players tab + pinned card on Daily Report

pinningModel.rationale: Baseball Project has a hard-coded 'Cardinals pin'. Pickleball has no equivalent single-institution favorite — no franchise-of-origin. Must be configurable per user. Brother in Virginia may favor a different MLP team than owner.

confidenceRendering.T2: Display with subtle 'sourced via X' footer link.
confidenceRendering.developing: Yellow dot + 'Developing' label. Requires T1 confirmation to promote.

caveats: Tab count is 8-10 active — owner may consolidate (e.g., merge Rankings + Ratings into single 'Standings' tab with toggle). Recommendation: keep separate per KB-0009.

Phase 1 module set (priority 1-6, 8, 10, 11) is intentionally achievable without deep curation. Phase 2+ modules (7, 9, 12, News tab, Learn tab) depend on either DUPR login/partnership, curation workflow, or rules content expansion.
Splash screen (per Baseball Project pattern) is Phase 3 polish, not Phase 1.
